questions.q: Which Australian teenager set a new world U20 record in the 200m race with a time of 19.67 seconds at the 2026 Australian Athletics Championships?
questions.correctText: Gout Gout broke the world U20 record for the 200m with a time of 19.67 seconds, also setting a new Australian record and becoming faster than Usain Bolt at the same age.

questions.q: Xbox has announced an 'Xbox First Look' showcase. What game will be featured in this upcoming showcase?
questions.correctText: The upcoming 'Xbox First Look' showcase will feature the game 'Metro 2039'.

questions.q: According to a Pew Research Center survey from October 2025, what is the primary format Americans still opt for when reading books?
questions.correctText: Print books remain the most popular format, with roughly two-thirds of U.S. adults reporting they read a physical book in the past 12 months.

questions.q: What is the release date for 'The Hunger Games: Sunrise on the Reaping'?
questions.correctText: The Hunger Games: Sunrise on the Reaping is set to be released on November 20, 2026.

questions.q: What percentage of books submitted to Kobo's self-publishing program in 2025 were rejected due to suspected AI generation?
questions.correctText: The company rejected nearly 45 percent of the books submitted to its self-publishing program in 2025, with about 80 percent of those rejections due to suspicions of AI generation.

questions.q: Allegations have surfaced regarding the misuse of Kickstarter funds for the failed MMO 'Ashes of Creation.' What are some of the alleged personal expenses funded by the Kickstarter money?
options: Private chefs, trading cards, and luxury cigars
Artist salaries and voice actor fees
Game engine licenses and software development tools
questions.correctText: Allegations suggest that funds from the 'Ashes of Creation' Kickstarter were used for personal expenses, including private chefs, trading cards, and luxury cigars.

questions.q: Hazelight Studios, known for games like 'It Takes Two' and 'A Way Out,' has announced a significant sales milestone. How many total sales have their games accrued?
questions.correctText: Hazelight Studios has announced that their three games, 'A Way Out,' 'It Takes Two,' and 'Split Fiction,' have sold over 50 million copies combined.

questions.q: What is the title of The Guardian's recent list of books recommended to read before turning 25?
options: 25 books to read before you turn 25
The Ultimate Reading List for Young Adults
questions.correctText: The Guardian's list is titled "25 books to read before you turn 25."

questions.q: Rockstar Games has confirmed a data breach occurred. What is the deadline the hacker group 'ShinyHunters' has given for a ransom payment?
questions.correctText: The hacker group ShinyHunters has set a deadline of April 14, 2026, for Rockstar Games to meet their ransom demands.

questions.q: Former Miami defensive end Rueben Bain Jr. was involved in a fatal car accident in which year?
questions.correctText: Rueben Bain Jr. was involved in a car accident in March 2024 that resulted in the death of a passenger three months later.
